title: CallbackServer
content:
# CallbackServer


Local HTTP server for handling OAuth callbacks


## Methods


### __init__(port: int) -> Any

Initialize the callback server.


### get_callback_url() -> str

Get the callback URL for the OAuth flow.


### start() -> None

Start the callback server.


### wait_for_callback(timeout: float) -> CallbackResult

Wait for the OAuth callback.


### stop() -> None

Stop the callback server
summary: Local HTTP server for handling OAuth callbacks
